The '''Barri''' were semi-sentient beings native to an unnamed planet in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. They were enigmatic space-faring creatures that could hitch rides on [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] and derelict spacecraft for thousands of years in space. Their acid secretions broke down and helped them digest the asteroid they clung to.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Though the entry in ''Creatures of the Galaxy'' claims that the Barri are only 5 meters in length, the picture accompanying the entry shows two figures watching a Barri pass by, and are dwarfed by the immense size of the creature.

==Appearances==
